title: spiesia ajanensis
intro: Spiesia ajanensis, also known as Schizonepeta, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Spiesia ajanensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving immune function. Spiesia ajanensis is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in herbal supplements and topical creams.
